reason: Step-015 was the active geometry chain's Step-1 scope-lock and admissibility gate, and it closed on the chain's own theorem-floor kill condition. The step did freeze a single endpoint family, comparator, gain currency, and candidate insertion line, but it also concluded that the only surviving geometric delta is proxy-based and requires a bridge back to the suitable-weak / LEI theorem floor that already looks theorem-scale. That invalidates the current chain before package selection, but it does not answer the broader mission question because run-010 left other live non-geometric reserve branches to compare after a geometry failure.
